faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about IPTV Pro

items.question: What is IPTV?
items.answer: IPTV is a TV broadcasting service over the Internet. It allows you to watch thousands of TV channels, movies and series through your internet connection without needing a satellite dish or cable. You can watch Arabic, international and sports channels from anywhere in the world.

items.question: How do I subscribe?
items.answer: Simply contact us on WhatsApp at the number shown on the website. We'll set up your account in less than 5 minutes and send you your login details with step-by-step instructions with images and video.

items.question: Which devices are supported?
items.answer: Our service works on all devices: Smart TVs (Android TV, Samsung, LG), phones (Android & iOS), PC, tablets, MAG, Enigma 2, and Apple TV.

items.question: Is there a money-back guarantee?
items.answer: Yes, we offer a full 7-day money-back guarantee if you're not satisfied with the service. Customer satisfaction is our priority and we are confident in the quality of our services.

items.question: Do you have beIN Sports channels?
items.answer: Yes, all sports channels are available including beIN Sports, SSC, and IPTV. All matches and world championships like Premier League, La Liga, Serie A, and Champions League.

items.question: What if I have connection issues?
items.answer: Our technical support team is available 24/7. Contact us on WhatsApp and we'll resolve the issue immediately. We also offer support via email and SMS.

footer.accepted_payments: We accept: PayPal, credit cards, bank transfer, cryptocurrencies
